calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-11-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Stern, Esq. for Plaintiff
Patricia Burns, Property Manager for Plaintiff, Richard Klein
Trina Roderick, Esq. for Defendant
Miriam Korpi, Defendant

Settlement Conference held. Case settled.
Six page written stipulation for entry of judgment with a two page addendum was read into the record. The basic terms were as follows:
Restitution and Possession of premises to Plaintiff located at:1371 10th Ave. #3, SF, CA by Midnight 3/31/04
Plaintiff agrees to waive rent for Jan., Feb and March 1-15, 2004 if Defendant vacates by Midnight, 3/31/04.
Each party to bear its own costs
Jury trial vacated.
Parties will submitt written stipulation for entry of judgment using proper form per CRC 201 re: Format of First Page.

JPT: Irving Pfeffer (303B) Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
